sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112360" key="fronimeu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φρονιμ-εύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n112360.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be wise, prudent,</tr_> Phyrn.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">364</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
